untranslatable_reason: Signal requires OLS regression-based cointegration analysis (R-squared > 0.50) and residual z-score calculations on a cointegrated pair. These are multivariate statistical measures requiring external computation beyond single-instrument indicators in the allowed list. The signal also requires pair trading logic (two correlated instruments) which is not supported by the single-symbol indicator framework.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using log_returns as a proxy for residual z-scores, but this is NOT equivalent to the cointegration model described. True implementation requires: (1) OLS regression fitting on a 60-bar lookback window, (2) residual extraction, (3) z-score normalization of residuals, (4) pair-based entry/exit logic. This cannot be expressed with allowed single-instrument indicators.
